Title: Enacts "Shavon's law" prohibiting enforcement of a lien where an occupant has a pending social services department storage fee assistance request or appeal
Summary: Enacts "Shavon's law" prohibiting enforcement of a lien where an occupant has a pending social services department storage fee assistance request or appeal; provides the necessary steps for ensuring such enforcement is paused.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the lien law, in relation to prohibiting enforcement of a lien where the occupant has a pending social services department storage fee assistance request or appeal
